name: Macadamia Nut French Toast
recipeIngredient: 1 (16-oz) loaf Italian bread, cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs and next 5 ingredients, stirring well.
2. Fit bread slices in a single layer into a lightly greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Pour egg mixture over bread slices; cover and refrigerate for hours or overnight, turning bread once.
3. Pour butter into a 15x10x2-inch jellyroll pan; place bread slices in a single layer in the pan.
4. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 minutes; sprinkle with nuts. Bake an additional 10 minutes.
5. Garnish, if desired, and serve immediately with maple syrup.
